name: Peach (or Nectarine!) Dessert Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, beat 1/2 cup of sugar with shortening until light and creamy.
3. Add the lemon rind to the mixture, then add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually blend in the sifted flour mix, beating thoroughly after each addition.
5. Pour half of the batter into a greased 8x8 inch pan.
6. Arrange peaches on top of the batter.
7. In another bowl, combine 1/3 cup of sugar, cinnamon, and chopped walnuts or pecans.
8. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the peaches and remaining batter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
10. Serve warm, cutting into squares if desired, and top with whipped cream when ready to serve.
